Print.desc: Prints a message to the screen and console.

PrintBold.desc: Prints a message in bold to the screen and console.

PrintHud.desc: Prints a message only to the screen (not console).

Log.desc: Prints a message to the console only.

LogI.desc: Prints an integer to the console.

HudMessage.desc: Displays a HUD message on screen.

HudMessageBold.desc: Displays a bold HUD message on screen.

SetFont.desc: Sets the font for subsequent HUD messages.

SetHudSize.desc: Sets the virtual HUD coordinate space.

BeginPrint.desc: Begins a print block for scripted HUD drawing.

MoreHudMessage.desc: Allows more HUD messages on screen simultaneously.

StrParam.desc: Returns a formatted string with parameter substitution.

Delay.desc: Pauses script execution for the specified number of tics.

TagWait.desc: Waits until the tagged sector(s) finish moving.

PolyWait.desc: Waits until the polyobject finishes moving.

ScriptWait.desc: Waits until the specified script finishes.

NamedScriptWait.desc: Waits until the named script finishes.

SetResultValue.desc: Sets the return value for the current script.

ACS_Execute.desc: Executes a script on the specified map.

ACS_Terminate.desc: Terminates a script on the specified map.

ACS_Suspend.desc: Suspends a script on the specified map.

ACS_ExecuteAlways.desc: Executes a script on the specified map, allowing concurrent instances.

ACS_ExecuteWithResult.desc: Executes a script and returns its result value.

ACS_NamedExecute.desc: Executes a named script on the specified map.

ACS_NamedExecuteAlways.desc: Executes a named script on the specified map, allowing concurrent instances.

ACS_NamedExecuteWithResult.desc: Executes a named script and returns its result value.

ACS_NamedTerminate.desc: Terminates a named script on the specified map.

ACS_NamedSuspend.desc: Suspends a named script on the specified map.

ACS_NamedLockedExecute.desc: Executes a named script with a lock check.

ACS_NamedLockedExecuteDoor.desc: Executes a named script with a lock check (door variant).

IsScriptActive.desc: Returns true if the specified script is currently running.

Restart.desc: Restarts the current script from the beginning.

Spawn.desc: Spawns an actor at the given fixed-point coordinates.

SpawnSpot.desc: Spawns an actor at a map spot with the given TID.

SpawnSpotFacing.desc: Spawns an actor at a map spot, facing the spot's direction.

SpawnSpotForced.desc: Spawns an actor at a map spot, even if blocked.

SpawnSpotFacingForced.desc: Spawns an actor at a map spot facing it, even if blocked.

Thing_Spawn.desc: Spawns a thing at the location of the actor with the given TID.

Thing_SpawnFacing.desc: Spawns a thing facing the same direction as the spawn spot.

Thing_SpawnNoFog.desc: Spawns a thing without teleport fog.

Thing_Remove.desc: Removes all things with the given TID.

Thing_Destroy.desc: Destroys all things with the given TID (plays death animation).

Thing_Damage.desc: Damages all things with the given TID.

ThingCount.desc: Returns the count of things of a given type/TID.

ThingCountName.desc: Returns the count of things of a given actor class.

ThingCountSector.desc: Returns the count of things in a tagged sector.

SetThingSpecial.desc: Sets the special for things with the given TID.

SetActorFlag.desc: Sets a flag on the actor with the given TID.

CheckActorFlag.desc: Returns true if the actor has the given flag set.

ClassifyActor.desc: Returns the classification of an actor (player, monster, etc.).

SetActorProperty.desc: Sets a property on the actor with the given TID.

GetActorProperty.desc: Returns a property value of the actor with the given TID.

SetActorAngle.desc: Sets the angle of the actor.

SetActorPitch.desc: Sets the pitch of the actor.

SetActorState.desc: Sets the state of the actor to a named state.

SetActorPosition.desc: Sets the position of the actor.

SetActorVelocity.desc: Sets the velocity of the actor.

GetActorX.desc: Returns the X coordinate of the actor.

GetActorY.desc: Returns the Y coordinate of the actor.

GetActorZ.desc: Returns the Z coordinate of the actor.

GetActorVelX.desc: Returns the X velocity of the actor.

GetActorVelY.desc: Returns the Y velocity of the actor.

GetActorVelZ.desc: Returns the Z velocity of the actor.

GetActorAngle.desc: Returns the angle of the actor.

GetActorPitch.desc: Returns the pitch of the actor.

GetActorFloorZ.desc: Returns the Z floor height underneath the actor.

GetActorCeilingZ.desc: Returns the Z ceiling height above the actor.

GetActorViewHeight.desc: Returns the view height of the actor.

SetActorClip.desc: Sets the clip of the actor.

ClearActorClip.desc: Clears the clip of the actor.

GiveInventory.desc: Gives an inventory item to the activator.

TakeInventory.desc: Takes an inventory item from the activator.

CheckInventory.desc: Returns the amount of an inventory item the activator has.

GiveActorInventory.desc: Gives an inventory item to the specified actor.

TakeActorInventory.desc: Takes an inventory item from the specified actor.

CheckActorInventory.desc: Returns the amount of an inventory item the actor has.

ClearActorInventory.desc: Clears the entire inventory of the specified actor.

UseInventory.desc: Forces the activator to use an inventory item.

DropInventory.desc: Drops an inventory item from the activator.

SetAmmoCapacity.desc: Sets the maximum ammo capacity for an ammo type.

GetAmmoCapacity.desc: Returns the max ammo capacity for an ammo type.

AddAmmoCapacity.desc: Adds to the max ammo capacity for an ammo type.

CheckWeapon.desc: Returns true if the activator has the specified weapon.

SetWeapon.desc: Selects the specified weapon for the activator.

GiveWeapon.desc: Gives a weapon to the activator.

TakeWeapon.desc: Takes a weapon from the activator.

Teleport_EndGame.desc: Ends the game and shows the finale.

Teleport.desc: Teleports the actor to the target thing.

TeleportOther.desc: Teleports an actor to a target thing.

TeleportInSector.desc: Teleports things from one tagged sector to another.

TeleportGroup.desc: Teleports all members of a group to a destination.

LocalSetMusic.desc: Changes the music for the activator only (client-side).

SetCameraToTexture.desc: Sets a camera texture view to follow a thing.

ChangeCamera.desc: Changes the activator's camera to view from the given actor.

PlaySound.desc: Plays a sound from the given actor.

SoundSequence.desc: Plays a sound sequence on a sector.

ThingSound.desc: Plays a sound from a thing.

Light_Fade.desc: Fades the light level of the tagged sector.

Light_Glow.desc: Creates a glowing light effect in the tagged sector.

Light_ChangeToValue.desc: Sets the light level of the tagged sector.

Light_RaiseByValue.desc: Raises the light level of the tagged sector.

Light_LowerByValue.desc: Lowers the light level of the tagged sector.

Light_Stop.desc: Stops the light effect on the tagged sector.

Light_Strobe.desc: Strobes the light level of the tagged sector.

Floor_LowerByValue.desc: Lowers the floor by the given value.

Floor_RaiseByValue.desc: Raises the floor by the given value.

Floor_MoveToValue.desc: Moves the floor to the given absolute height.

Ceiling_LowerByValue.desc: Lowers the ceiling by the given value.

Ceiling_RaiseByValue.desc: Raises the ceiling by the given value.

Ceiling_MoveToValue.desc: Moves the ceiling to the given absolute height.

Door_Raise.desc: Raises a door and then closes it after a delay.

Door_Animated.desc: Opens an animated door and closes it after a delay.

Plat_DownWaitUpStay.desc: Lowers a platform, waits, then raises it.

Pillar_Build.desc: Builds a pillar to the specified height.

Sector_SetColor.desc: Sets the color of a tagged sector.

Sector_SetFade.desc: Sets the fade color of a tagged sector.

Sector_SetDamage.desc: Sets damage for a tagged sector.

Sector_SetCeilingPanning.desc: Sets ceiling texture panning for a sector.

Sector_SetFloorPanning.desc: Sets floor texture panning for a sector.

Sector_SetCeilingScale.desc: Sets ceiling texture scale for a sector.

Sector_SetFloorScale.desc: Sets floor texture scale for a sector.

Line_SetBlocking.desc: Sets blocking flags for a line.

Line_SetTextureOffset.desc: Sets texture offset for a line.

Line_SetTextureScale.desc: Sets texture scale for a line.

Line_SetIdentification.desc: Sets identification parameters for a line.

GetLineRowOffset.desc: Returns the current line's row offset.

GetSectorLightLevel.desc: Returns the light level of a tagged sector.

GetSectorFloorZ.desc: Returns the floor Z of a tagged sector.

GetSectorCeilingZ.desc: Returns the ceiling Z of a tagged sector.

PlayerCount.desc: Returns the number of players currently in the game.

PlayerNumber.desc: Returns the player number of the activator.

ActivatorTID.desc: Returns the TID of the activator.

SetPlayerProperty.desc: Sets a player property for the given player.

CheckPlayerCamera.desc: Returns true if the player is viewing through a camera.

SetPlayerCamera.desc: Sets the player's camera to the given actor.

PlayerIsBot.desc: Returns true if the player is a bot.

PlayerIsSpectator.desc: Returns true if the player is spectating.

GetPlayerIP.desc: Returns the player's IP address as an integer.

Random.desc: Returns a random integer between min and max inclusive.

sin.desc: Returns the sine of the angle (fixed-point angle).

cos.desc: Returns the cosine of the angle (fixed-point angle).

VectorAngle.desc: Returns the angle vector from origin to (x, y).

min.desc: Returns the minimum of two values.

max.desc: Returns the maximum of two values.

CheckSight.desc: Returns true if there's a line of sight between two actors.

CheckActorClass.desc: Returns true if the actor is of the given class.

CheckActorState.desc: Returns true if the actor is in the given state.

SetCVar.desc: Sets a server CVar to the given value.

GetCVar.desc: Returns the integer value of a server CVar.

SetCVarString.desc: Sets a server CVar to the given string value.

GetCVarString.desc: Returns the string value of a server CVar.

RequestScriptPuke.desc: Requests a client to puke (execute) a script.

NamedRequestScriptPuke.desc: Requests a client to puke a named script.

SendNetworkString.desc: Sends a network string to the specified player.

AllowClientSideScripts.desc: Enables or disables CLIENTSIDE script execution.

GetGameMode.desc: Returns the current game mode number.

GetGameModeState.desc: Returns the current game mode state.

Team_Score.desc: Returns the current score of the given team (count mode).

Team_CountPlayers.desc: Returns the number of players on the given team.

SetTeamScoreLimit.desc: Sets the team score limit (count mode).

SetTimeLimit.desc: Sets the time limit for the current game mode.

SetFragLimit.desc: Sets the frag limit for the current game mode.

SetWinLimit.desc: Sets the win limit for the current game mode.

GetTeamProperty.desc: Returns a property value of the given team.

ConsoleCommand.desc: Executes a console command on the server.

SetActivator.desc: Changes the activator to the specified actor.

SetActivatorToPlayer.desc: Changes the activator to the specified player.

GetBaseActorX.desc: Returns the X position of the actor without interpolation.

GetBaseActorY.desc: Returns the Y position of the actor without interpolation.

GetBaseActorZ.desc: Returns the Z position of the actor without interpolation.

SetPlayerIgnoringVoiceChat.desc: Sets voice chat ignore flags for a player.
